ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CHRIS JORY, SARAH KARP MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS GRANTED. NO REAL PROPERTY CLAIM IS STATED IN THIS COMPLAINT FOR SPECIAL AND GENERAL DAMAGES. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT NOTICE OF LIS PENDENS DOES NOT APPEAR IN THE COURT RECORD. SEE 405.22.JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Filed By Defendants Chris Jory And Sarah Karp
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Daniel Ohren, Esq. representing Plaintiff Daniel Ohren via Zoom Call.
David Wasserman, Esq. representing Defendants Chris Jory and Sarah Karp.

Hearing held.

Plaintiff argues by offer of proof.
Defendant responds to the argument.
The motion is discussed and argued.

After hearing the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRIS JORY, SARAH KARP Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens.

is GRANTED. No real property claim is stated in this complaint for special and general damages. The Court also notes that Notice of Lis Pendens does not appear in the Court record. See 405.22.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
